question: how many students are enrolled
alt_questions: how many students do we have
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM students
LIMIT 100

question: how many active students are there
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM students
WHERE students.status ILIKE 'active'
LIMIT 100

question: how many students in each class
alt_questions: number of students in each class
sql:
SELECT classes.name AS class_name, COUNT(students.id) AS student_count
FROM classes
LEFT JOIN class_sections ON class_sections.class_id = classes.id
LEFT JOIN students ON students.class_section_id = class_sections.id
GROUP BY classes.id, classes.name
ORDER BY classes.grade_level ASC
LIMIT 100

question: how many students in each category
sql:
SELECT students.category, COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM students
WHERE students.category IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY students.category
ORDER BY students.category ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list all students
sql:
SELECT students.full_name, students.registration_number, students.status, students.created_at
FROM students
ORDER BY students.full_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: show all active students
sql:
SELECT students.full_name, students.registration_number, students.status, students.created_at
FROM students
WHERE students.status ILIKE 'active'
ORDER BY students.full_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: show students in a class
sql:
SELECT students.full_name, classes.name AS class_name, class_sections.name AS section_name, students.roll_number, students.status
FROM students
LEFT JOIN class_sections ON class_sections.id = students.class_section_id
LEFT JOIN classes ON classes.id = class_sections.class_id
WHERE classes.name ILIKE '%placeholder%'
ORDER BY students.full_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list students in a section
sql:
SELECT students.full_name, classes.name AS class_name, class_sections.name AS section_name, students.roll_number, students.status
FROM students
LEFT JOIN class_sections ON class_sections.id = students.class_section_id
LEFT JOIN classes ON classes.id = class_sections.class_id
WHERE class_sections.name ILIKE '%placeholder%'
ORDER BY students.full_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: show withdrawn students
sql:
SELECT students.full_name, students.registration_number, students.status, students.updated_at
FROM students
WHERE students.status ILIKE 'withdrawn'
ORDER BY students.full_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: count students by blood group
alt_questions: how many students with each blood group
sql:
SELECT students.blood_group, COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM students
WHERE students.blood_group IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY students.blood_group
ORDER BY students.blood_group ASC
LIMIT 100

question: find a student by name
sql:
SELECT students.full_name, students.surname, students.registration_number, students.roll_number, students.status, students.date_of_birth
FROM students
WHERE students.full_name ILIKE '%placeholder%'
ORDER BY students.full_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: how many students joined this year
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM students
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM students.created_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
LIMIT 100

question: students not assigned to any class
sql:
SELECT students.full_name, students.registration_number, students.status, students.created_at
FROM students
WHERE students.class_section_id IS NULL
ORDER BY students.full_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: how many students have withdrawn
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM students
WHERE students.status ILIKE 'withdrawn'
LIMIT 100

question: find student by registration number
alt_questions: look up student by registration number
sql:
SELECT students.full_name, students.surname, students.registration_number, students.roll_number, students.status, students.date_of_birth
FROM students
WHERE students.registration_number ILIKE '%placeholder%'
LIMIT 100

question: how many staff members are there
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM staff
WHERE staff.deleted_at IS NULL
LIMIT 100

question: how many active staff are there
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM staff
WHERE staff.status ILIKE 'active'
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
LIMIT 100

question: how many male and female staff are there
sql:
SELECT staff.gender, COUNT(*) AS staff_count
FROM staff
WHERE staff.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY staff.gender
ORDER BY staff.gender ASC
LIMIT 100

question: count staff by category
alt_questions: how many staff in each category
sql:
SELECT staff.staff_category, COUNT(*) AS staff_count
FROM staff
WHERE staff.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY staff.staff_category
ORDER BY staff.staff_category ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list all staff members
sql:
SELECT staff.employee_id, staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff.designation, staff.department, staff.status
FROM staff
WHERE staff.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY staff.first_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: show all active staff members
sql:
SELECT staff.employee_id, staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff.designation, staff.department, staff.staff_category
FROM staff
WHERE staff.status ILIKE 'active'
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY staff.first_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list staff by designation
alt_questions: show teachers with a specific designation
sql:
SELECT staff.employee_id, staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff.designation, staff.department
FROM staff
WHERE staff.designation ILIKE '%placeholder%'
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY staff.first_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list staff in a department
sql:
SELECT staff.employee_id, staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff.designation, staff.department
FROM staff
WHERE staff.department ILIKE '%placeholder%'
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY staff.first_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list all contract staff
sql:
SELECT staff.employee_id, staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff.employment_type, staff.contract_start, staff.contract_end
FROM staff
WHERE staff.employment_type ILIKE 'contract'
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY staff.first_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list all female staff members
sql:
SELECT staff.employee_id, staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff.designation, staff.staff_category
FROM staff
WHERE staff.gender ILIKE 'female'
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY staff.first_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: which teachers have TET certification
sql:
SELECT staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff.designation, staff_certifications.cert_type, staff_certifications.cert_name, staff_certifications.validity_date
FROM staff
LEFT JOIN staff_certifications ON staff_certifications.staff_id = staff.id
WHERE staff_certifications.cert_type ILIKE 'tet'
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY staff.first_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list staff with a specific qualification
sql:
SELECT staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff.designation, staff_qualifications.qualification_name, staff_qualifications.level, staff_qualifications.university
FROM staff
LEFT JOIN staff_qualifications ON staff_qualifications.staff_id = staff.id
WHERE staff_qualifications.qualification_name ILIKE '%placeholder%'
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY staff.first_name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: find a staff member by name
alt_questions: look up a teacher by name
sql:
SELECT staff.employee_id, staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff.designation, staff.department, staff.staff_category, staff.status, staff.date_of_joining
FROM staff
WHERE (staff.first_name ILIKE '%placeholder%' OR staff.last_name ILIKE '%placeholder%')
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
LIMIT 100

question: show all class teachers
sql:
SELECT staff.employee_id, staff.first_name, staff.last_name, staff_teaching_assignments.class_name, staff_teaching_assignments.section, staff_teaching_assignments.academic_year
FROM staff
LEFT JOIN staff_teaching_assignments ON staff_teaching_assignments.staff_id = staff.id
WHERE staff_teaching_assignments.is_class_teacher = true
AND staff.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY staff_teaching_assignments.class_name ASC, staff_teaching_assignments.section ASC
LIMIT 100

question: how many teaching staff versus non-teaching staff
alt_questions: count of teaching and administrative staff
sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN staff.staff_category ILIKE 'teaching%' THEN 'teaching' ELSE 'non_teaching' END AS category_type, COUNT(*) AS staff_count
FROM staff
WHERE staff.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY category_type ASC
LIMIT 100

question: how many classes are there
alt_questions: how many classes in the school
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM classes
WHERE classes.is_active = true
LIMIT 100

question: list all classes
sql:
SELECT classes.name, classes.grade_level, classes.is_active
FROM classes
ORDER BY classes.grade_level ASC, classes.name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: show all active classes
sql:
SELECT classes.name, classes.grade_level, classes.description
FROM classes
WHERE classes.is_active = true
ORDER BY classes.grade_level ASC, classes.name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: how many sections does each class have
alt_questions: number of sections in each class
sql:
SELECT classes.name AS class_name, COUNT(class_sections.id) AS section_count
FROM classes
LEFT JOIN class_sections ON class_sections.class_id = classes.id
WHERE classes.is_active = true
GROUP BY classes.id, classes.name
ORDER BY classes.grade_level ASC
LIMIT 100

question: which class has the most students
alt_questions: which class has the highest number of students
sql:
SELECT classes.name AS class_name, COUNT(students.id) AS student_count
FROM classes
LEFT JOIN class_sections ON class_sections.class_id = classes.id
LEFT JOIN students ON students.class_section_id = class_sections.id
GROUP BY classes.id, classes.name
ORDER BY student_count DESC
LIMIT 100

question: which class has the fewest students
sql:
SELECT classes.name AS class_name, COUNT(students.id) AS student_count
FROM classes
LEFT JOIN class_sections ON class_sections.class_id = classes.id
LEFT JOIN students ON students.class_section_id = class_sections.id
GROUP BY classes.id, classes.name
ORDER BY student_count ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list all sections in a class
alt_questions: what sections are in a class
sql:
SELECT classes.name AS class_name, class_sections.name AS section_name, class_sections.is_active
FROM classes
LEFT JOIN class_sections ON class_sections.class_id = classes.id
WHERE classes.name ILIKE '%placeholder%'
ORDER BY class_sections.name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: number of students in each class and section
alt_questions: student count by class and section
sql:
SELECT classes.name AS class_name, class_sections.name AS section_name, COUNT(students.id) AS student_count
FROM classes
LEFT JOIN class_sections ON class_sections.class_id = classes.id
LEFT JOIN students ON students.class_section_id = class_sections.id
GROUP BY classes.id, classes.name, class_sections.id, class_sections.name
ORDER BY classes.grade_level ASC, class_sections.name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: list all subjects
sql:
SELECT subjects.name, subjects.code, subjects.category, subjects.status
FROM subjects
WHERE subjects.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY subjects.name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: how many subjects are offered
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM subjects
WHERE subjects.status ILIKE 'active'
AND subjects.deleted_at IS NULL
LIMIT 100

question: count subjects by category
alt_questions: how many subjects in each category
sql:
SELECT subjects.category, COUNT(*) AS subject_count
FROM subjects
WHERE subjects.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY subjects.category
ORDER BY subjects.category ASC
LIMIT 100

question: show all active subjects
sql:
SELECT subjects.name, subjects.code, subjects.category, subjects.assessment_type
FROM subjects
WHERE subjects.status ILIKE 'active'
AND subjects.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY subjects.name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: what subjects does a class have
alt_questions: which subjects are taught in a class
sql:
SELECT subjects.name, subjects.code, subjects.category, class_subjects.periods_per_week, class_subjects.is_elective
FROM subjects
LEFT JOIN class_subjects ON class_subjects.subject_id = subjects.id
LEFT JOIN classes ON classes.id = class_subjects.class_id
WHERE classes.name ILIKE '%placeholder%'
AND subjects.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY subjects.name ASC
LIMIT 100

question: what is the current academic year
sql:
SELECT academic_years.name, academic_years.start_date, academic_years.end_date, academic_years.status
FROM academic_years
WHERE academic_years.is_current = true
LIMIT 100

question: list all academic years
sql:
SELECT academic_years.name, academic_years.start_date, academic_years.end_date, academic_years.status, academic_years.is_current
FROM academic_years
ORDER BY academic_years.start_date DESC
LIMIT 100

question: show active academic years
sql:
SELECT academic_years.name, academic_years.start_date, academic_years.end_date, academic_years.is_current
FROM academic_years
WHERE academic_years.status ILIKE 'active'
ORDER BY academic_years.start_date DESC
LIMIT 100

question: how many academic years are configured
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM academic_years
LIMIT 100

question: how many admission applications are there
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM admission_applications
LIMIT 100

question: count admissions by status
alt_questions: how many admissions in each status
sql:
SELECT admission_applications.status, COUNT(*) AS application_count
FROM admission_applications
GROUP BY admission_applications.status
ORDER BY admission_applications.status ASC
LIMIT 100

question: show pending admission applications
sql:
SELECT admission_applications.student_name, admission_applications.class_applied, admission_applications.parent_name, admission_applications.parent_phone, admission_applications.status, admission_applications.created_at
FROM admission_applications
WHERE admission_applications.status ILIKE 'inquiry'
ORDER BY admission_applications.created_at DESC
LIMIT 100
